title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
